_doc: Repo-specific config for the generic burst-bug-hunter skill (Vela). Paths (initScript, verbs) resolve relative to THIS file's directory. driver-server.mjs reads readyExpr/resetExpr/initScript/viewport/jobTimeoutMs; the rest is documentation for the caller.
notes: Reset is RELOAD-based (no resetExpr): the app exposes window.__velaBooted but NOT an in-memory reset hook, so ctx.reset()/vrun --reset does a full page.reload() — reliable but costs a boot (~1-2s), so keep bursts short and prefer navigating back over resetting mid-burst; jobTimeoutMs is 20s to leave room for reload+boot+multi-step. burst-init.js installs an in-mem window.storage polyfill so the save-status path is exercisable offline. GOTCHA: once the app enters fullscreen presenter mode (synthetic/real 'f'), Playwright page.keyboard.press AND ctx.shot HANG (headless requestFullscreen) — drive presenter keys via synthetic dispatch (see navKey/presentKey verbs) + CDP touch + real mouse/wheel; take shots only after leaving fullscreen.
